fileSpec.purpose: Next.js configuration file with environment variable handling, module aliases, and build optimizations
requirements: Configure Next.js with TypeScript support
Set up environment variable validation for DATABASE_URL and NEXTAUTH_SECRET
Configure module path aliases for @/modules, @/shared, @/domains
Enable experimental features for app directory
Configure image domains and security headers

fileSpec.purpose: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme, color palette, and component utilities
requirements: Define custom color palette for calculator UI
Configure spacing, typography, and border radius scales
Set up dark mode support with class strategy
Add custom utilities for calculator button states
Configure content paths for all module directories

fileSpec.purpose: Prisma database schema defining Calculator model with fields for state persistence
requirements: Define Calculator model with id (cuid), value (String), operator (String), and timestamps
Add indexes for query performance on frequently accessed fields
Configure PostgreSQL provider with connection pooling
Set up migration naming convention
Add seed data for initial calculator state

fileSpec.purpose: Core domain entity representing calculator state with business logic encapsulation
requirements: Define CalculatorEntity class with value, operator, and previousValue properties
Implement value object pattern for immutable state transitions
Add methods for basic operations: add, subtract, multiply, divide
Include validation for division by zero and overflow handling
Export TypeScript interfaces for external consumption

fileSpec.purpose: Reusable input validation utilities with regex patterns for calculator inputs
requirements: Create validateNumberInput function with regex for numeric strings
Implement validateOperator function for +, -, *, / operators
Add sanitizeInput function to prevent XSS
Export validation result types with success/error discriminated unions
Include unit test examples in JSDoc comments

fileSpec.purpose: Centralized error handling utility with structured error types and logging
requirements: Define AppError class extending Error with statusCode and isOperational properties
Create handleAsyncError wrapper for async route handlers
Implement formatErrorResponse for consistent API error format
Add logging integration with environment-aware log levels
Export error codes enum for calculator-specific errors

fileSpec.purpose: Application service orchestrating calculator operations with domain entity and validation
requirements: Implement CalculatorService class with executeOperation method
Integrate CalculatorEntity for state management
Use inputValidator for request validation
Apply errorHandler for consistent error responses
Add getState and resetState methods for API endpoints
Include dependency injection constructor for testability

fileSpec.purpose: Root layout component with providers, global styles, and metadata configuration
requirements: Implement Next.js 13+ root layout with html and body tags
Import global Tailwind CSS styles
Configure metadata for SEO and Open Graph
Add font optimization with next/font
Set up theme provider for dark mode support
Include error boundary for client-side error handling

fileSpec.purpose: Home page redirecting to calculator with server-side rendering
requirements: Implement server component with minimal client-side JS
Redirect to /calculator route using Next.js navigation
Add loading skeleton for perceived performance
Include meta tags for calculator page
Handle middleware authentication check

fileSpec.purpose: Interactive calculator page component with display, keypad, and state management
requirements: Create client component with 'use client' directive
Implement calculator display showing current value and operator
Build responsive keypad grid with number and operator buttons
Integrate CalculatorService via API calls to /api/calculator
Add keyboard event listeners for desktop input
Implement loading states and error display
Use Tailwind CSS for styling with dark mode support
Add accessibility attributes (aria-labels, roles)
